package rulecoverage

func NegativeRedisNoTtlOnCacheKeys() string {
    ruleID := "redis_no_ttl_on_cache_keys"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, 0)` or `rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, redis.KeepTTL)` for cache-like keys without TTL"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
